metadata.title: SYNGO_BP_2410
metadata.comment:
Rationale: TANC overexpression in cultured neurons increases the density of dendritic spines and excitatory synapses.
Selective decrease in spine density in the CA3 region of the TANC1-/- hippocampus.. Experimental description: Primary neuron culture, transfection, and immunohistochemistry.
Cultured hippocampal neurons were prepared from embryonic (embryonic day 18) rat brain as described previously (Goslin and Banker, 1991).

cDNA constructs.

Human TANC1 [amino acids 217-1861; ΔC (a mutant that lacks the last three residues), amino acids 217-1858) and human TANC2 (amino acids 129-1990; ΔC, amino acids 129-1897) were subcloned from the KIAA1728 and KIAA1636 into p3XFLAG-CMV (Sigma).
